name: assemblyai
description: Reads AssemblyAI transcripts, per-transcript detail, sentences, paragraphs, and word-search matches, and submits new transcription jobs, through the AssemblyAI REST API.

risk.read: external AssemblyAI API read of transcript metadata, per-transcript detail/sentences/paragraphs/word-search matches, fanned out over every listed transcript
risk.write: submits a new transcription job (POST /v2/transcript) against a caller-supplied audio_url; consumes account balance/quota
